Report.description: This report displays campaigns with Salesloft outreach associated commencing 10th February and ending 18th February

criteriaItems.value: 2020-02-10_Connect NYC_HOL Announcement/Extended Early Bird_Unmailables_INEM_SL,2020-03-04_Legal_20Q3_Toronto CoS/RRT pilot_HALF DAY,2020-03-04_Legal_20Q3_Toronto CoS/RRT pilot_FULL DAY,2020-02-14_Connect NYC_Announce Best Practices Sessions_Unmailables_INEM_SL,2020-03-17_Legal_20Q2_Finance Roundtable_NYC,2020-03-18_Legal_20Q3_Finance Roundtable_CHI,2020-03-19_Legal_20Q3_Finance Roundtable_KC

Report.name: Campaigns with Salesloft emails
